release_notes: - Fixed device staying ON after Teams meetings end (stale meeting watchdog). - Fixed false re-activation after meeting ends from lingering mic/camera activity. - Improved microphone detection with polling fallback for USB audio devices. - Browser tabs scanned before desktop apps for accurate web meeting identification. - Faster config save when no device is configured (skips mDNS search). - Clearer save confirmation message when no device is configured. - Check for Updates now responds on first click.
